description_short: Soft luxury meets firm support! A pillow that stays evenly filled and doesn't shed lint, now with memory foam and high-density foam inserts to customize height and firmness.

construction_layers.name: Microfiber Fill
construction_layers.notes: Doesn't get lumpy. Base fill of the pillow.

construction_layers.name: Memory Foam Insert (removable)
construction_layers.notes: Customizable height and firmness — can be removed.

construction_layers.name: High Density Foam Insert (removable)
construction_layers.notes: Adds extra support — can be removed.

cover_fabric.wash_instructions: Unzip, remove both inserts, then wash pillow. Cold water with msupport detergents.

proprietary_tech.name: Removable Foam Inserts
proprietary_tech.description: Memory foam + HD foam inserts can be added/removed to customize height and firmness.

faq_specs.question: How do I wash the Hybrid Pillow?
faq_specs.answer: Caring for the Hybrid Pillow is incredibly easy. Simply unzip, remove both the inserts, and then throw the rest of the pillow for a wash.

faq_specs.question: Can the hybrid pillow be used with or without the memory foam and High Density foam inserts?
faq_specs.answer: Yes, it can be used with or without the inserts.
